caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a solid black background. She wears a light green, patterned tunic with a dark collar and a thin black necklace. A small lavalier microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the bottom-left corner of the scene, a logo containing a stylized symbol and the text "NPTEL" is visible. As the sequence progresses, she speaks and uses hand gestures to emphasize her points, moving her hands up and down in front of her chest. Her facial expressions shift slightly as she talks, and she maintains a consistent posture throughout. The setting remains static, with the woman as the central focus of the shot.
